Comment: goated professor. Explains really well and quizzes and exams are very easy. Pick him for every CS course possible

Comment: The goat of CS department. Take any class that is offered with him. Simply the best, teaches well, always willing to elaborate, easy quizzes and exams. Barely any stress in the class but at the same time if you just listen you learn, that is how good he teaches. GOAT

Comment: GOAT CS professor. Take him he's also a chill dude.
Prof Wang is pretty good. The course was most difficult in the homeworks, but in turn the final and the midterm were quite easy.
Easy class. It is a good introduction to DSA. Wang is a good lecturer. The exams and quizzes are very easy. Study the slides and watch Neetcode and you will be fine.

He's a funny and very nice professor. Lectures are simple, often just reading from the PowerPoint but he is always available to help you on any topic. His accent may be difficult to understand at first but he is always ready to repeat himself or explain more if need be. The major tests are pretty easy. There's a weekly quiz that doesn't count much
Tags: EXTRA CREDIT, Clear grading criteria, Beware of pop quizzes

Comment: I had a spotty understanding of Java after 120, but Wang solidified it. He explains things very clearly and will insist you ask questions until you fully understand. He is happy to repeat and re-explain concepts that are tricky for us and really wants us to learn the material. 1 midterm, 1 final, weekly labs and quizzes but they helped me learn tbh
Tags: Amazing lectures, Lecture heavy

Comment: Great guy, great class
Tags: Amazing lectures, Respected, Lecture heavy

Comment: Not the most exciting topic in CS, so lectures can feel like an eternity. Still, the professor helps make it as manageable as possible. He is happy to answer questions. Tests are fair and are pretty reflective of homework. There were times where the homework problems were not provided as examples in class, so clarify those examples. I recommend.
Tags: Clear grading criteria, Caring, Lecture heavy

Comment: His lectures were mostly spent copying text from the board that he was copying from the textbook, so you can get lost very easily. However, he is a very caring professor and would explain concepts the times it is necessary for you to understand. Definitely, his class is easier than other professors that teach it, so if you can, try to take him.
Tags: Caring, Lecture heavy, Accessible outside class

Comment: I would take any class with Prof. Wang! He is by far the best in the Computer Science Department. I am always excited to go to his class and learn. He is passionate, funny, and actually steps up to teach difficult topics in an understandable way. He makes sure that everyone understands the content and has reasonable expectations.
Tags: Amazing lectures, Inspirational, Respected

Comment: Average lecturer but tries to explain but also has an accent. You might need to self learn and read. He uploads last year's recordings which were useful if you don't attend classes but going do help a lot. No slides after first week so you need to get the notes. HWs are doable with a midterm and a final with only 10-15 MCQs including extra credit.
Tags: Get ready to read, EXTRA CREDIT, Lecture heavy

Comment: How a university class should be! Work in = work out. Study and come to class and you will do great. He is energetic and passionate about computer science and really makes you want to learn. The content is difficult but that is the nature of the course and he explains it thoroughly. Always willing to take questions and make it even more clear.
Tags: Clear grading criteria, Respected, Online Savvy

Comment: One of the easiest CSC class! Weekly quiz from slides, 1 midterm & a final, all MCQs on lockdown browser! He reads the slides in class but attendance optional. Be prepared to learn the contents from YouTube tho. Labs are tricky so take TAs help unless you are good at programming. Offers 2.5% extra credit in both midterm and final. Study & easy A!
Tags: Get ready to read, EXTRA CREDIT, Graded by few things

Comment: I learned so much this semester in Professor Wang's CSC 220 class! He made difficult material easy to understand. Assignments were manageable and perfect workload. I always felt challenged but engaged. His course is based on a point system and it is very fair. Would recommend.
Tags: Amazing lectures, Hilarious, Caring

Comment: Zheng Wang is one of the best teachers I had at the University of Miami. He took the most intimidating subject I knew of going into my major and made it understandable. He keeps his lectures interesting, and he is very nice to his students.
Tags: Amazing lectures, Caring, Accessible outside class

Comment: Not the best teacher for explaining questions. But definitely the least boring lectures I had.
If you simply pay attention during class, you will be completely fine. If you are not that good at coding, the labs may be difficult, but the TAs will help (if you actually show up to the labs).
Tags: Clear grading criteria

Comment: Would not recommend ZW for 220. The man himself is nice, but his class was always confusing (kids all too frequently pointed out errors in his slides) and dull. Also, the class usually ended 30 mins early, leaving me to learn the material that *should* have been taught in my own time. Labs were awful; TAs only read instructions and did not help.

Comment: He is so sweet and really wants his students to do well.

Comment: He is one of the worst professors Ive had at UM, he can not explain concepts very well to the point that other students would have to step in and explain things for him. I would take him for anything possible lectures are fun. He makes it a point to have everyone laugh and learn.

Comment: Professor Zheng is awesome! My favorite professor at UM so far. Tests are very similar to homework problems.

Comment: Seriously, what can I tell you about Dr. Wang? Well, hes what every teacher wants to be. He took a subject that was hard as hell, and he made it easy to understand.  His class was enjoyable.  I have ADD and it was easy to pay attention in his class. TAKE HIM if you have the chance. Just go to class, do your homework, and youll do well.

Comment: Amazing teacher and super nice guy; he does his best to make a very boring class fun. His class was straight forward and easy as long as you go to class and pay attention. We had weekly assignments, a mid term, and a final. On both tests he offers extra credit.
